/usr/lib64/ccache/bin/g++  -fPIC -D_LANGUAGE_C_PLUS_PLUS  -O0 -g -D_DEBUG -DTARG_MIPS -shared -Wl,-soname,prompf_anl.so -o ../../../lib/mips/prompf_anl.so CMakeFiles/prompf_anl-mips.dir/__/com/cxx_template.cxx.o CMakeFiles/prompf_anl-mips.dir/__/lno/lwn_util.cxx.o CMakeFiles/prompf_anl-mips.dir/anl_diagnostics.cxx.o CMakeFiles/prompf_anl-mips.dir/anl_cbuf.cxx.o CMakeFiles/prompf_anl-mips.dir/anl_file_mngr.cxx.o CMakeFiles/prompf_anl-mips.dir/anl_srcpos.cxx.o CMakeFiles/prompf_anl-mips.dir/w2cf_translator.cxx.o CMakeFiles/prompf_anl-mips.dir/anl_varlist.cxx.o CMakeFiles/prompf_anl-mips.dir/anl_pragma_attribute.cxx.o CMakeFiles/prompf_anl-mips.dir/anl_loop_construct.cxx.o CMakeFiles/prompf_anl-mips.dir/anl_region_construct.cxx.o CMakeFiles/prompf_anl-mips.dir/anl_pragma_construct.cxx.o CMakeFiles/prompf_anl-mips.dir/anl_func_entry.cxx.o CMakeFiles/prompf_anl-mips.dir/anl_driver.cxx.o CMakeFiles/prompf_anl-mips.dir/anl_lno_dump.cxx.o ../../../lib/mips/libcomutil.a ../../../lib/mips/be.so ../../../lib/mips/libcomutil.a ../../../lib/mips/libtarginfo.a -lm -ldl -Wl,-rpath,/home/jhj/compiler/build/lib/mips:
